sourceMovie.title: Push
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Push (2009) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Paul McGuigan's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Gemini Man
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Push clicked for you, Gemini Man (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Push?
faq.answer: Try Gemini Man, Serenity, Insurgent—each shares DNA with Push while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Push?
faq.answer: Push (2009) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Push worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
